description: Map database for game simulation with sector-based terrain information

Altored Divide Bar Remake 1.6.2.description: Large 8x8 land map with grassy highlands, sand lowlands, and mountain cliffs dividing the terrain

Avalanche 3.4.description: Winter naval map with snow/ice terrain, deep water, and coastal shores suitable for mixed land-sea combat

BarR 1.1.description: Desert map with rocky sand terrain, diagonal water channels, and elevated rocky outcrops

Coast To Coast BAR v1.0.description: Naval-focused map with large deep water center and coastal shores on opposite sides

Crater Islands Remake v1.0.1.description: Rugged island map with mixed shore/land terrain, steep impassable cliffs, and scattered highlands

Evad River Confluence v2.description: Pure deep water naval map with smooth flat terrain, ideal for submarine and ship-only battles

Hooked 1.1.1.description: Small deep water naval map with some elevated underwater ridges, designed for naval engagements
